productDisplayName: Fila Men's Retro Red Casual Shoe
description: Get ready to hang out in style in these Retro shoes from fila. These trendy shoes are a fresh take on a classic style. Team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers with perforations on the toe box and sides for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Brand logo embroidered on the on the side, tongue and heel counter for style Midsole Full-length EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Outsole Abrasion resistant outsole for cushioning and impact protection Pivot point for easy 180 degree movement of the foot without injuring the ankle Wash careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
